title: Algerian Lamb Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew made with lamb, spices, and dried fruits. Perfect for a cold winter evening.

ingredients.name: algerian spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add spice blend, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Add apricots and olives, and stir to combine.
Transfer to a preheated oven and cook at 300°F (150°C) for 2 hours.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
